query:
SELECT 'Categorias' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = 150004
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Produtos' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 150004
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Grupos de Complementos' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM complementGroups WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 150004)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Itens de Complementos' as tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM complementItems WHERE groupId IN (SELECT id FROM complementGroups WHERE productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 150004));
